# Digitalcraft Studio

> Digital Growth Agency based in Vrindavan, India. We build websites, rank businesses on Google Maps, run Meta Ads, set up WhatsApp CRM, and build custom AI automation for local businesses.

## About
Digitalcraft Studio is a digital growth agency founded by Kanchan, based in Vrindavan, Uttar Pradesh, India (281121). We serve local businesses in Vrindavan, Mathura, Agra, Delhi NCR, and remote clients across India.

Contact: hello@digitalcraftstudio.in | WhatsApp: +91-7906630435
Website: https://digitalcraftstudio.in

## Services

### Website & Landing Pages
Mobile-first websites for bookings, enquiries, menus, rooms, tours, coaching, and real estate leads. Starting at INR 8,000. Best for hotels, dharamshalas, shops, tours, restaurants.

### Local SEO & Google Maps
Google Business Profile optimization, local keyword ranking, review strategy, and monthly SEO actions. INR 3,000 - 8,000/month. Best for hotels, shops, clinics, restaurants, service providers.

### Meta Ads & Lead Generation
Facebook and Instagram ads designed for calls, WhatsApp chats, bookings, and walk-in enquiries. INR 5,000 - 15,000/month. Best for coaching, real estate, restaurants, hotels, events.

### AI & Business Automation
Automations that save staff time by connecting enquiries, follow-ups, reports, and reminders. Starting at INR 15,000. Best for teams handling repeated enquiries and bookings.

### WhatsApp CRM
Organise WhatsApp enquiries with auto replies, follow-ups, status tracking, and reminders. Setup from INR 10,000. Best for hotels, tour operators, coaching, service businesses.

### Branding & Design
Clean visual identity for businesses that need to look credible online and offline. INR 5,000 - 40,000. Best for new shops, cafes, hotels, local brands.

### Social Media & Reels
Monthly content that keeps your business visible during festivals, weekends, and local demand peaks. INR 6,000 - 12,000/month. Best for restaurants, shops, hotels, temples, events.

### YouTube & Livestream
Video support for aarti, satsang, events, spiritual content, Shorts, thumbnails, and video SEO. INR 5,000 - 10,000/month. Best for temples, ashrams, events, creators, local brands.

## Results
- Google Maps Ranking: Top 3 for local keywords
- WhatsApp Leads: 400+ monthly inquiries generated
- Lead Growth: 5x increase in qualified leads
- Keywords Ranked: 120+ top positions in search

## FAQ

### Why does a Vrindavan business need digital marketing?
Most customers now search on Google Maps, Instagram, and WhatsApp before they visit, book, or call. A strong digital setup helps hotels, shops, restaurants, tours, and service businesses appear trustworthy and get real enquiries.

### Can you help with Google Maps ranking and local SEO?
Yes. We work on Google Business Profile optimisation, local keywords, review strategy, service pages, photos, posts, tracking, and website signals so your business has a stronger chance to show for nearby searches.

### Do you build websites or only run ads?
We do both. We can build fast websites, landing pages, booking pages, WhatsApp lead funnels, Meta ads, Google visibility systems, and monthly reporting depending on what your business needs first.

### How soon can I start getting leads?
Paid campaigns can start bringing enquiries faster once creatives, targeting, and landing pages are ready. SEO and Google Maps growth usually needs consistent work, but the goal is always practical: more calls, bookings, walk-ins, and WhatsApp chats.

### Do you work in Agra and Delhi too?
Yes. We work with businesses in Vrindavan, Mathura, Agra, Delhi NCR, and remote locations. The strategy changes by market, but the focus stays the same: calls, bookings, WhatsApp leads, and measurable local visibility.

### How does payment work?
Most projects start with a confirmed scope and an advance payment. The remaining amount is collected by milestone or before launch, depending on the project size and timeline.

### Do you offer monthly packages?
Yes. Monthly packages are available for Google Maps SEO, Meta ads, content, reporting, website care, WhatsApp follow-ups, and ongoing growth support.
